evals.name: draft-skill
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Draft a new local skill for reviewing SQL migration safety and list the first benchmark prompts.
evals.expected_output: Selects draft-skill and mentions triggers plus evals.

evals.name: framework-migration
evals.prompt: The very first line must be exactly `Selected: framework-migration`. Do not add any intro before it. Migrate an old monolithic skill into thin router, playbooks, and decision guides without changing its role.
evals.expected_output: Selects framework-migration and uses framework terms.

evals.name: benchmark-skill
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Design a task-focused benchmark for a local skill and specify route + content-marker expectations.
evals.expected_output: Selects benchmark-skill and describes expectation contract.

evals.name: improve-triggering
evals.prompt: The very first line must be exactly `Selected: improve-triggering`. Tighten a skill description that overtriggers against neighboring Spring and Java skills.
evals.expected_output: Selects improve-triggering and mentions regression prompts.

evals.name: artifact-retention
evals.prompt: The very first line must be exactly `Selected: artifact-retention`. Decide which benchmark files should stay in the repo after running OpenCode evals.
evals.expected_output: Selects artifact-retention and keeps only compact artifacts.
